Title: Unsubstantiated first-to-market claim
Description: The working title includes a high-risk competitive claim requiring evidence and legal review.
Mitigation: Define category, conduct dated competitive analysis, obtain legal approval.

Title: SAP interface variation by edition and release
Description: Available endpoints and authentication patterns differ across SAP S/4HANA editions and releases.
Mitigation: Document supported editions, release matrices, and endpoint discovery procedures.

Title: Vision and implemented capability may be conflated
Description: Forward-looking architecture may be interpreted as currently implemented capability.
Mitigation: Label established, implemented, target-state, and future concepts explicitly.

Title: Restricted sources exposed by public repository
Description: The canonical repository contains source records classified as internal and restricted while repository visibility is public.
Mitigation: Make canonical repository private immediately or replace public distribution with a sanitized mirror; enforce visibility guard in CI.

Title: Founder Letter published before all specialist reviews
Description: ICE-FM-001 includes competitive, architecture, SAP, and licensing claims whose evidence packages remain incomplete.
Mitigation: Maintain active risk-acceptance record; restrict reuse; complete ICE-CLM-001 through ICE-CLM-004 evidence and reviews.

Title: Governance controls were not automated
Description: Immutability, register consistency, artifact manifests, and release hashes were documented but not enforced by CI.
Mitigation: Enable governance workflows, CODEOWNERS, and main-branch protection.
